data.title: NSF 23-561: Computer and Information Science and Engineering Core Programs
data.eligibility: Eligibility Information: Universities and Colleges. Anticipated Funding Amount: $100,000,000. Dates: January 15, 2024 to October 23, 2024. This program supports research in artificial intelligence, machine learning, and computer systems. Maximum award is $500,000....
data.description: Eligibility Information: Universities and Colleges. Anticipated Funding Amount: $100,000,000. Dates: January 15, 2024 to October 23, 2024. This program supports research in artificial intelligence, machine learning, and computer systems. Maximum award is $500,000.
